title: Account settings

publicProfile.description: The public display name is shown as the author when you publish an entry to the public culture library. If it is not set, publications appear anonymous.
publicProfile.helperText: Visible to all visitors of the public culture library. Leave blank to publish anonymously.

deleteDescription: If you delete your account, it is deactivated immediately and permanently anonymized or deleted after 14 days.
restoreDescription: You can undo the deletion within this period.
dialogWarning: Please confirm with your current password and the text "{{phrase}}". Your account will be deactivated and permanently anonymized after 14 days.
deletionScheduled: Your account has been scheduled for deletion. It will be permanently deleted on {{date}}.

errors.generic: The action could not be performed.

unsavedChangesWarning: There are unsaved changes. They will be lost when you leave the page.

emailConfirm.title: Confirm email change
emailConfirm.invalid: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired.

developer.title: Developer
developer.hintsDescription: Reset local development hints or show the first-project onboarding again. This does not delete projects or account data.
